ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Arthur C. Lipton, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Thanya Suwansawad, who was placed under oath and examined.
Salee Suwansawad, a witness for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Greg Bronstein.
Default was entered against defendant on May 19, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, August 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Thanya Suwansawad, and against the Defaulted Defendant Greg Bronstein as follows:

Compensatory Damages - $20,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $8,666.00.
Costs - $485.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $29,151.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Continued To Oct-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
